_comment: adman non-secret config defaults (CONF-01/02/03). Source-of-truth values for a fresh .store/config.json. Empty ManagedOUs => a fresh install fails closed until configured (CONF-02). Keys prefixed '_comment' are stripped by the loader before validation (D-04) and are NOT written into the runtime .store/config.json.

DenyList.note: starter, not exhaustive - built-in Administrator (RID 500), matched by SID/RID (D-05)
starter, not exhaustive - Guest (RID 501), matched by SID/RID (D-05)
starter, not exhaustive - krbtgt (RID 502), matched by SID/RID (D-05)

safety._comment_requireManagedGroupOU: Opt-in D-04 group-OU enforcement. Default false; protected groups live in CN=Users/Builtin and legitimate shared groups typically live outside managed user/computer OUs.
safety._comment_typedCountVerbs: Verbs that ALWAYS require typed-count confirmation, even below bulkConfirmThreshold (WR-02). Default ['Remove-LocalUser'] (D-03).

security._comment: D-05 password sourcing. Generate = CSPRNG via New-AdmanRandomPassword (junior default); Prompt = Read-Host -AsSecureString with complexity validation (senior escape hatch); Ask = per-action sub-choice. mustChangeAtNextLogon consumed by New-AdmanUser / Set-AdmanUserPassword / Adman.AD.Write.New-ADUser as the ChangePasswordAtLogon fallback.

bulk._comment_maxCount: Placeholder cap only. ENFORCEMENT is Phase 4 (BULK-02); not enforced in Phase 0.

timeouts._comment_perHostProbeCap: Phase 3 (RMT-02): hard ceiling for classifying one target host (WinRM -> CIM/WSMan -> CIM/DCOM). Dead hosts return Skipped instead of hanging.
timeouts._comment_totalInventoryRemoteCap: Phase 3 (RMT-02): hard ceiling for the entire fleet remote-enrichment pass inside Get-AdmanInventoryReport. Remaining hosts marked Skipped once exceeded.
